body:
## Summary
- adds an explicit UHR test-status source key for chapter 12 current-source note factboxes
- marks intro editorial tip factboxes as editorial commentary instead of allowing the default UHR fallback
- expands ebook parity and content validation guards so raw `.ebook__factbox p` markup must carry explicit source metadata

## Root cause
Raw static ebook factbox paragraphs were rendered through `createEbookFootnoteCollector.annotate(rawBodyHtml)` without `data-ebook-source-keys`, so they inherited `EBOOK_DEFAULT_PROSE_SOURCE_KEYS = ['uhrStudyMaterial']`. Editorial study tips could therefore be footnoted as UHR-sourced.

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-static-site-ebook-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "ebook|factbox|source key|raw factbox|editorial tip|current source notes"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-static-ebook-provenance`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`

## Known unrelated baseline
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test scripts/static-site-source-provenance-copy.test.js` currently fails on `static FAQ no-JS fallback mirrors the English dictionary` because `faq.3.a` differs between the static no-JS fallback and the English dictionary. This PR does not touch the FAQ fallback or dictionary files.
title: uiux: require ebook factbox provenance keys
